steps.title: Set up the equation from the word problem
steps.content: The positive number is $x$. The number that is 7 more than $x$ is $x + 7$. Their product is 228.

steps.title: Test the answer choices
steps.content: Backsolving $x=19$: If $x = 19$, then $x + 7 = 26$, and $19 \times 26 = 494 \neq 228$. Fails. Testing $x=12$: If $x = 12$, then $x + 7 = 19$, and $12 \times 19 = 228$. B is correct.
